BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin after Coral Ridge signaled a lease bump at the October 2026 renewal. Pre-quarterly-review estimate.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit with Anthony once 2025 actuals are closed. Line labels: MembershipDues=insurance-reimbursed visits (300/mo at $118 avg), DropIns=self-pay visits, EquipmentSales=speaking/honoraria, InstructorPay_Raj=clinician payroll for Foster/Hawthorne/Bennett, AaronDrawFromNet=owner draw.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent increases to $3,400/mo at October renewal
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $27,053 + $200 increase = $27,253. At $118 average reimbursement per visit, $27,253 / $118 = 230.9 - 231 billable visits/month minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Well within capacity at ~300 visits/month across three clinicians.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - rent to $3,600/mo plus therapist hire
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Tighter. The LCSW/LMHC hire stretches the budget but adds billable therapy capacity to offset.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~231 to 233 billable visits/month at current cost structure. At full schedule across three clinicians we have headroom. Main concern is the seasonal summer dip and the lease bump landing together.
